def generate_signals(df, params):
    import pandas as pd
    import numpy as np
    import ta
    adx_window = params['adx_window']
    rsi_window = params['rsi_window']
    rsi_lower = params['rsi_lower']
    rsi_upper = params['rsi_upper']
    df['adx'] = ta.trend.adx(df['high'], df['low'], df['close'], window=adx_window)
    df['rsi'] = ta.momentum.rsi(df['close'], window=rsi_window)
    signals = np.where((df['adx'] < 25) & (df['rsi'] < rsi_lower), 1, np.where((df['adx'] < 25) & (df['rsi'] > rsi_upper), -1, 0))
    return pd.Series(signals, index=df.index, dtype='int')
rationale: EUR/USD exhibits mean reversion tendencies in low ADX conditions, with RSI extremes signaling potential reversals in ranging markets.
